channel.title: ASP.NET Core on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in ASP.NET Core on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: .NET 11 Preview 4 is now available!
item.description:
The .NET 11 Preview 4 blog post announces the preview release and notes updates across the runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, and related areas. The provided excerpt does not include the specific feature or bug-fix details.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: .NET 11 Preview 3 is now available!
item.description:
Microsoft announced .NET 11 Preview 3, covering updates across the runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, and container images. The provided excerpt does not include specific feature details.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: ASP.NET Core 2.3 end of support announcement
item.description:
ASP.NET Core 2.3 will reach end of support on April 7, 2027. Microsoft says users should plan to upgrade applications to a currently supported .NET version.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: .NET 11 Preview 2 is now available!
item.description:
Microsoft announced .NET 11 Preview 2, with updates across the runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, Blazor, C#, and .NET MAUI. The post points readers to the preview release details, but the provided excerpt does not list specific changes.

  • Source: .NET
